headline: Is It Too Late To Consider AutoZone (AZO) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether AutoZone's share price still reflects good value after a strong multi year run, it helps to step back and look at what the current market price might be implying. The stock last closed at US$3,882.47, with returns of 1.4% over 7 days, 4.8% over 30 days, 17.5% year to date and 11.6% over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 54.1% and 212.8% respectively. Recent news coverage has focused on AutoZone's position in the US auto parts retail space and how the...

headline: Stocks to Watch Tuesday: MongoDB, Best Buy, Target
summary: ↘️ AST SpaceMobile (ASTS): The space-based cellular-network developer reported mixed quarterly results but said it anticipated revenue growth in 2026. Shares dropped 4% in premarket trading. ↘️ MongoDB (MDB): The database company posted better-than-expected financial results, but gave soft guidance for this quarter, triggering further concerns that artificial intelligence could upend its business.

content.title: Stocks to Watch Tuesday: MongoDB, Best Buy, Target
content.summary: ↘️ AST SpaceMobile (ASTS): The space-based cellular-network developer reported mixed quarterly results but said it anticipated revenue growth in 2026. Shares dropped 4% in premarket trading. ↘️ MongoDB (MDB): The database company posted better-than-expected financial results, but gave soft guidance for this quarter, triggering further concerns that artificial intelligence could upend its business.

headline: How The Mixed Analyst Outlook Is Shaping The AutoZone (AZO) Investment Story
summary: AutoZone's refreshed fair value price target of US$4,205.75, up from US$4,196.38, reflects only modest adjustments to the underlying model. This sits alongside a Street backdrop where some firms are lifting targets into the low US$4,000s, while others cut or downgrade toward levels like US$3,880, underscoring a split view on how much investors should pay for the shares. As you read on, you will see how this mix of higher and lower targets shapes the evolving narrative around risk, reward, and...

headline: AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q1 CY2026 Earnings, Stock Drops
summary: Auto parts and accessories retailer AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 8.1% year on year to $4.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $27.63 per share was 1.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q1 CY2026 Earnings, Stock Drops
content.summary: Auto parts and accessories retailer AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 8.1% year on year to $4.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $27.63 per share was 1.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: AutoZone Stock Drops After Earnings. Winter Storms Weighed on Sales, Retailer Says.
summary: Shares of  AutoZone  fell sharply Tuesday after the auto parts retailer reported weaker-than-expected quarterly sales growth.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $27.63 a share for its fiscal second quarter, down from $28.29 last year but above analysts’ consensus estimate of $27.15.  AutoZone stock dropped 6.4% to $3,633.11.

content.title: AutoZone Stock Drops After Earnings. Winter Storms Weighed on Sales, Retailer Says.
content.summary: Shares of  AutoZone  fell sharply Tuesday after the auto parts retailer reported weaker-than-expected quarterly sales growth.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $27.63 a share for its fiscal second quarter, down from $28.29 last year but above analysts’ consensus estimate of $27.15.  AutoZone stock dropped 6.4% to $3,633.11.
